title: CEC Certifications

prose:
<div class="cert-grid">
<div class="cert"><div class="cert__icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
License SA-CEC-2014-0847. Authorised to claim STCs and install grid-connected systems nationally.
Custom system designs meet AS/NZS 5033 and AS/NZS 4777 standards.
Committed to best-practice installation and consumer protection.
Quality management system for design, installation and customer service.
